title: Share amount formatting across billing summaries
natural_prompt: Introduce a shared `formatAmount` helper and use it from both invoice and receipt summaries, so both show totals as dollar amounts while keeping their labels unchanged.
prompt: Introduce a shared `formatAmount` helper and use it from both invoice and receipt summaries, so both show totals as dollar amounts while keeping their labels unchanged.
success_criteria: Invoice and receipt totals both render as dollar amounts
Both summaries use a shared amount formatter
overbuild_risks: Leaving duplicate amount formatting in each summary
